edge_hypothesis: Bollinger Band breakouts exploit volatility clustering in crypto markets. When price closes above the upper band with above-average volume, it signals genuine buying pressure during volatility expansion — not random noise. This is fundamentally different from all other templates which are trend-continuation signals: Bollinger breakouts target trend INITIATION from compression phases. Crypto exhibits strong volatility clustering (GARCH effects), meaning breakouts tend to follow through rather than mean-revert. Volume confirmation filters false breakouts.
regime_assumption: Works best in transitional regimes (ADX 15-30) where trends are forming out of ranges. Also profitable in early trending phases. Invalidates in deep ranging markets with no directional pressure and in late-trend exhaustion where bands are already wide.

variants.name: bollinger_vol_breakout
variants.description: Standard Bollinger breakout with moderate volume confirmation (1.2x average). Tests whether BB breakouts with volume have any baseline edge in crypto. Volume ratio ensures genuine participation, not just price spike on thin liquidity.
entry_long: Require close > BBU_20_2.0 (upper Bollinger Band) on bar close.
entry_short: Require close < BBL_20_2.0 (lower Bollinger Band) on bar close.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on price closing back inside Bollinger Bands (breakout failure).
Exit on max bars in trade threshold (15 bars).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: False breakout with immediate reversal
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Low-volume breakout on thin liquidity
risk_rules: Risk note: risk per trade target is 1%.
Stop loss at 1.5x ATR_14 from entry.
Take profit at 2.5x ATR_14 from entry (1.67:1 R:R).
Minimum viable stop floor: 1.0x ATR per advisory.

variants.name: bollinger_high_conviction
variants.description: High-conviction breakout requiring strong volume surge (1.5x average) with wider TP target. Fewer trades but higher quality. Hypothesis: the strongest breakouts (high volume) have the best follow-through.
entry_long: Require close > BBU_20_2.0 (upper Bollinger Band) on bar close.
Require volume >= 1.5x 20-period volume moving average (high conviction).
entry_short: Require close < BBL_20_2.0 (lower Bollinger Band) on bar close.
Require volume >= 1.5x 20-period volume moving average (high conviction).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on price closing back inside Bollinger Bands (breakout failure).
Exit on max bars in trade threshold (20 bars).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: False breakout with immediate reversal
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Volume spike from single whale order (not sustained)
risk_rules: Risk note: risk per trade target is 1%.
Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 from entry (wider for high-conviction trades).
Take profit at 3.5x ATR_14 from entry (1.75:1 R:R).
High-conviction entries deserve wider stops to avoid noise shakeouts.

variants.name: bollinger_btc_wide
variants.description: BTC-calibrated Bollinger breakout with wider stops (2.5x ATR) to accommodate BTC's extreme volatility. Evidence: prior BTC specs with 1.5x ATR had 981 drawdown. Uses standard volume confirmation to maintain trade frequency.
entry_long: Require close > BBU_20_2.0 (upper Bollinger Band) on bar close.
Require volume >= 1.0x 20-period volume moving average (baseline confirmation).
entry_short: Require close < BBL_20_2.0 (lower Bollinger Band) on bar close.
Require volume >= 1.0x 20-period volume moving average (baseline confirmation).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Asset calibration: BTC requires wider stops due to higher absolute volatility
exit_rules: Exit on price closing back inside Bollinger Bands (breakout failure).
Exit on max bars in trade threshold (20 bars).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: BTC flash crash exceeding wide stop
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Weekend low-volume false breakout
risk_rules: Risk note: risk per trade target is 0.75% (reduced for BTC volatility).
Stop loss at 2.5x ATR_14 from entry (BTC-calibrated).
Take profit at 3.5x ATR_14 from entry (1.4:1 R:R).
Asset-specific: BTC drawdowns historically 10-20x larger than ETH at same ATR mult.
